sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 18:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 18:1
items.html: The light of the line that the circles received caused in them a recognition of degrees of one below the other, where windows were made in them from the impression of the screen, and all the degrees of the line also emerged in circles. (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner light, Item 90)
